title: vanilla Overhaul +
description: A visual and terrain-focused 1.20.1 modpack that transforms Minecraft into a more immersive, beautiful, and exploration-rich world—while keeping the heart of vanilla gameplay.
body:
🌍 Vanilla Overhaul – A Complete Visual & Terrain Transformation
Minecraft 1.20.1 | Exploration-Focused | Visual Enhancement | Gameplay Revamp

Vanilla Overhaul is a bold reimagining of Minecraft 1.20.1 that pushes the boundaries of what “vanilla-friendly” can mean. This modpack delivers dramatically improved terrain generation, gorgeous visuals, and a deeply immersive world—all while staying grounded in the spirit of Minecraft.

🔑 Key Features:
🌄 Overhauled Terrain Generation – Say goodbye to bland landscapes. With enhanced biomes, realistic worldgen, and stunning vistas, exploration is more rewarding than ever.

🎨 Visual Upgrades – Enjoy immersive lighting, ambient effects, and polished textures that elevate the Minecraft experience to a whole new level.

🧭 Exploration and Immersion First – Whether you're discovering hidden valleys or building scenic bases, this pack makes the world feel alive.

✨ Lightweight on Systems – Carefully curated to balance aesthetics and performance, keeping your game smooth and beautiful.

🎮 Gameplay Tweaks – Subtle changes to mechanics and UI that enhance playability without overwhelming complexity.

👥 Who It's For:
Perfect for players who love the feel of vanilla, but crave a more dynamic, beautiful, and engaging world. Great for builders, adventurers, and casual survival players who want Minecraft to feel fresh without diving into heavy tech or magic systems.
